backend/main.mo: Main ICP actor defining data types (Item, BorrowRequest, LostItem, FoundItem, Profile), app state maps, authorization mixin, and 20+ pre-populated demo items across categories like Books, Calculators, Sports, and Hostel Essentials.
backend/migration.mo: Data migration module for canister upgrades that currently performs a no-op, passing old actor state through unchanged.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming high-confidence implementation of the backend pre-population feature with 20+ demo items, listing related frontend files and components.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each component's purpose and recent changes, used as build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the Fluxera React SPA, mounting the app at `#root` and loading the Vite entry module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that sets up TanStack Router with all application routes, QueryClient provider, ThemeProvider, and a shared Layout with Navigation and Footer.
frontend/src/components/AddItemForm.tsx: Form component for listing a new item to lend, collecting name, description, category, hashtag, per-day/month prices, and location, then calling the `useAddItem` mutation.
frontend/src/components/BorrowRequestFor: Empty file placeholder for the BorrowRequestForm component with no implemented content.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer displaying the Fluxera logo, navigation links, rupee pricing note, copyright, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
Modal dialog for viewing item details and submitting a borrow request, supporting day/month pricing selection and duration input.
frontend/src/components/ItemLocationDisp: Simple display component that renders an item's text-based location with a map pin icon.
frontend/src/components/ItemQRCode.tsx: Generates and displays a QR code for an item URL using a public API, with a download button.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Sticky top navigation bar with desktop and mobile layouts, auth-aware login/logout controls, and a dropdown for extra links.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Blocking modal form that collects a new user's name and contact info to create their Fluxera profile.
frontend/src/components/UpdateItemLocati: No-op stub component retained to avoid breaking imports; GPS-based location updating has been removed.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login, logout, and persisted identity state via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks wrapping all backend actor calls for profiles, items, borrow requests, and lost-and-found operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports the Inter font, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens using oklch values.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with TanStack QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: Static About page displaying Fluxera's mission, vision, core values, and key stats in a multi-section layout with hero, stats bar, and value cards.
frontend/src/pages/BorrowPage.tsx: Browse and search page for available rental items, featuring category/branch filters, a search input, and item cards that open a detail modal on click.
frontend/src/pages/CategoriesPage.tsx: Static categories listing page that displays a grid of item categories (books, electronics, tools, etc.) as links that navigate to the Borrow page with a pre-selected category filter.
frontend/src/pages/ContactPage.tsx: Contact page with a display-only form (name, email, message) that shows a success state on submission, alongside contact info cards for email, WhatsApp, and location.
frontend/src/pages/FAQPage.tsx: FAQ page rendering a list of common questions and answers in an accordion component, covering safety, pricing, item listing, and platform usage.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page for Fluxera displaying a hero section, item categories, how-it-works steps, and platform benefits targeting KTU students in Kerala. Includes navigation buttons to borrow and lend flows.
frontend/src/pages/HowItWorksPage.tsx: Informational page explaining Fluxera's three-step process (Search, Borrow, Return) with pricing details and platform values like verified students and sustainability.
frontend/src/pages/LendPage.tsx: Authenticated page where KTU students can list items for lending via AddItemForm and manage incoming borrow requests (approve/deny) for their listed items.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page using Internet Identity authentication that redirects authenticated users with profiles to the borrow page and shows a ProfileSetupModal for new users.
frontend/src/pages/LostFoundPage.tsx: Page for reporting and browsing lost and found items on campus, with tabbed views, report forms (lost/found), and resolve actions for authenticated KTU students.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: User profile page displaying identity, borrowed/lent items, and borrowing history in tabs, with logout and principal copy functionality. Requires Internet Identity login to access.
frontend/src/pages/QRScannerPage.tsx: QR scanner page using device camera to scan item QR codes, parsing results as FLUxera item URLs or numeric IDs and showing toast notifications.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers and hash cleanup.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the FLUxera design system with custom blue/teal color palette, border radii, box shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state document describing FLUxera as a KTU student item-sharing platform with INR pricing, listing all existing features, architectural notes, and known issues.
